name: IRC_CX_APP_DRAFTS
description: Details of the site themes which is used to customize the look of a site.

columns.Name: APP_DRAFT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the application draft. System generated value.

columns.Name: DRAFT_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Indicates the source of draft data

columns.Name: LAST_ACCESSED_ON
columns.Comments: Last user agent used by user to access application draft

columns.Name: LEGAL_DESC_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: LEGAL_DESCRIPTION_VERSION_ID to save legal description id in rest

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the IRC_CX_SITES_B table.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the object

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Requisition number used to identify application draft requisition.

columns.Name: PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Telephone number. Not marked as mandatory in order to always allow creation of a first phone row for every person even when phone number is not provided.

columns.Name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Candidate email address used to identify candidate.

columns.Name: COUNTRY_CODE
columns.Comments: Country code of the Phone Number.

columns.Name: AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: The Area Code of the Phone Number.

columns.Name: CONTENT
columns.Comments: JSON payload with the application draft.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Candidate Number used to get last modified date from Candidates

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_JOB_EXECUTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Last execution date of the ESS job needed for idempotency.

columns.Name: CONTENT_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: PROPOSED_CAND_NUM
columns.Comments: Candidate number of the candidate who does not have entry in IRC_CANDIDATES. Needed for Inline Assessments.

columns.Name: PREFERRED_CHANNEL
columns.Comments: Preferred Communication channel for the candidate. It can be E-mail, phone or something else.

columns.Name: MODIFICATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of modification of the record done by the draft REST Service it is not the same as LAST_UPDATE_DATE as we don't want it to be updated every time row is changed.

columns.Name: JOB_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the row after ESS job was executed it is enumeration of different statuses for example ORA_INVALID, ORA_FIRST_NOTIF_SENT.

columns.Name: APPLY_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Request Information Flow. Reference to the IRC_APPLY_FLOWS_B table.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Submission on which Request Information Flow is needed. Reference to the IRC_JA_SECONDARY_FLOWS table.

columns.Name: STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Request Information Flow Action Id. Reference to the IRC_JA_SECONDARY_FLOWS table.

columns.Name: EXTRA_INFO1
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: EXTRA_INFO2
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: EXTRA_INFO3
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: EXTRA_INFO4
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.

columns.Name: EXTRA_INFO5
columns.Comments: Attribute to store additional information.
